overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through the vibrant countryside of Toussaint. The character travels along dirt paths through vineyards with a picturesque castle visible on a distant hill, approaching a rural farmstead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside path with vineyard views

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path with swords on back, enjoying the scenic mountain views

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain peaks forming the backdrop of the valley
large stone castle perched on a distant hill overlooking the countryside
winding dirt path with patches of grass running through the center of the frame
rustic wooden post fence running alongside the left side of the path
tall slender evergreen trees dotting the landscape

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open dirt path bordered by a wooden fence on the left, with expansive views of snow-capped mountains and the distant Beauclair castle. The landscape features scattered cypress trees and rolling vineyard hills under a bright blue sky.

events.description: character turns left off the main path into the grassy area between vineyard rows

agents.ego_description: veering off the main path to walk through the grass between vineyard rows, exploring the countryside

notable_agents.action: peasant bending over tending to the vineyard trellises

entered.detail: rows of wooden vineyard supports with green vines growing in organized lines
rows of wooden vineyard supports with green vines on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the fenced path to explore between rows of vineyards, passing cypress trees. An NPC worker becomes visible tending to the vines on the right side as the path curves through the cultivated landscape.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path through the vineyard rows toward the farm buildings

notable_agents.action: peasant working near the vineyard trellises on the left side
peasant bending over tending vines on the right side

entered.detail: rustic stone building with terracotta roof tiles approaching in the distance
wooden farm cart with wheels parked near the vineyard edge

segments.scene_description: Walking deeper through the vineyard estate with workers tending the vines on both sides. The stone farm buildings and a wooden cart come into view ahead while the distant castle and mountains shift to the sides of the frame.

events.description: entering the farmstead area with stone buildings and wooden fencing

agents.ego_description: approaching the farmstead buildings and passing through the entrance area near the wooden cart

notable_agents.action: peasant walking near the farmhouse entrance carrying items

entered.detail: simple wooden gate structure marking the entrance to the farmstead
stone outbuilding with wooden roof adjacent to the main farmhouse

segments.scene_description: Arriving at the rural farmstead with stone buildings and wooden fencing. The character passes through the entrance area where an NPC is walking near a wooden cart, transitioning from the open vineyards to the built farm environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open countryside path into the heart of a bustling vineyard farmstead. It begins along a dirt path bordered by a wooden fence, offering expansive views of snow-capped mountains and the distant Beauclair castle under a bright blue sky. As the camera leaves the fenced road, the scene shifts into the rows of cultivated vineyards, passing cypress trees and a worker tending to the vines. The perspective then pushes deeper into the estate, where workers appear on both sides and the distant mountains slide out of frame to reveal stone farm buildings and a wooden cart ahead. Finally, the movement concludes as the camera passes through the entrance of the rural farmstead, transitioning from the open greenery to the structured environment of stone walls and wooden fencing.
